description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and angular limbs extending in unnatural directions. The head is relatively realistic, featuring a human face with short hair, but the body and limbs are stretched and twisted, creating a surreal, almost sculptural form. The torso is fused with sharp, planar extensions that jut outwards, giving the figure a fragmented and deconstructed appearance. The lower body is similarly elongated, with one leg visible and the other obscured or merged into the abstract structure. The overall form is dynamic and visually striking, with a mix of smooth and angular surfaces. The object is primarily composed of smooth, hard materials with a semi-glossy finish.
description: A surreal, abstract adult pedestrian figure with a realistic head and highly elongated, angular limbs and body, resembling a fragmented sculpture.
description_view_0: The front view shows the human head and face clearly, with the torso and limbs dramatically stretched and angular, forming sharp, planar extensions.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated, blade-like extensions and the abstract, fragmented nature of the body, with the head partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the head and the extreme length and angularity of the limbs, with the body appearing almost skeletal and deconstructed.
description_view_3: This view shows the underside and lower extensions, with one leg visible and the rest of the form appearing as a tangle of sharp, planar shapes.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting top and pants with no visible accessories or outerwear
attribute_posture: standing with limbs and body extremely elongated and distorted
